emails.subject: Re: Meeting with Da Mayor
emails.body: Re: Meeting with Da Mayor thanks! so do you know whether this has been forwarded to Cristina and Bev's office?? did you talk to them directly?? I'm wondering if I should call them to follow-up? Let me know what you think, Thanks again, Joseph

emails.subject: Re: Meeting with Da Mayor
emails.body: Re: Meeting with Da Mayor I'd leave a voicemail with Sandi (she's taking voicemail on her trip) and ask her if she'd like for you to contact them.
